calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-18-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ryan Jorgensen for proposed executor Mark Zajac (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Amended Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary.

The Court clarified the correct spelling of Donna Blaker's name and confirmed that the trust beneficiaries were the petitioner and Glide Memorial Church, as James Reed had predeceased the decedent. The Court waived the requirement for Notice of Directions for Remote Appearance.

Following discussion, the Court granted the petition. The will dated July 21, 2004, and the first codicil dated July 6, 2021, were admitted to probate. Mark Zajac was appointed as executor with full IAEA authority. The Court ordered a minimum bond of $20,000 due to non-California residency. Amy Harrington was appointed as probate referee. The Court set a status hearing for August 24, 2027, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, and ordered the personal representative to file either a petition for final distribution or a status report in compliance with Probate Code section 12200 et seq. no later than two weeks prior to the hearing.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
